subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the leaves of the Tree of Thy Oneness and the fruits of the Tree of Thy Singleness and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باوراق سدره وحدانیتک و اثمار شجره فردانیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for women
